title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 251.260 - Expenses of regional commission members
text:
251.260.  Expenses of regional commission members. — No compensation shall be paid members of regional planning commission provided that this shall not affect in any way remuneration received by any state or local official who, in addition to his responsibilities and duties as a state or local official, serves also as a member of the regional planning commission.  All members may be reimbursed for actual expenses incurred as members of the commission in carrying out the work of the commission.
(L. 1965 2d Ex. Sess. p. 908 § 10)
